name: @guardrail/client
description: Typed TypeScript client for the Guardrail Alpha read-only API.

scripts.example: tsc src/index.ts src/types.ts src/proof.ts examples/verify-and-journal.ts --outDir .example-build --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop && node .example-build/examples/verify-and-journal.js
